content: We can integrate the Intrinsic Curiosity Module (ICM) into the permission-bounded OpenClaw-ACP autonomous agent harness architecture to create *curiosity-governed autonomous agents*, where ICM's exploration signal is filtered through ACP's predefined operation permission layers before being allowed to drive agent actions.
source_topics: agent harness ACP openclaw autonomous agent framework architecture
trigger_topic: agent harness ACP openclaw autonomous agent framework architecture
